title: parosela laevigata
intro: Parosela laevigata, also known as the Rough Parosela, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which has been used to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it a potential treatment for wounds and infections. In traditional medicine, Parosela laevigata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
